items.title_en: Met some legends and friends today at Code with Claude. Of all the AIs, Claude still feels the most like a trusted friend and I’m glad that now @AnthropicAI has the compute to scale. https://t.co/MpADxwZ06D
items.title_zh: 今天与 Claude 一起在 Code 上认识了一些传奇人物和朋友。在所有人工智能中，克劳德仍然感觉自己是最值得信赖的朋友，我很高兴现在 @AnthropicAI 拥有可扩展的计算能力。 https://t.co/MpADxwZ06D
items.title_bilingual: 今天与 Claude 一起在 Code 上认识了一些传奇人物和朋友。在所有人工智能中，克劳德仍然感觉自己是最值得信赖的朋友，我很高兴现在 @AnthropicAI 拥有可扩展的计算能力。 https://t.co/MpADxwZ06D / Met some legends and friends today at Code with Claude. Of all the AIs, Claude still feels the most like a trusted friend and I’m glad that now @AnthropicAI has the compute to scale. https://t.co/MpADxwZ06D

items.title: Outcomes lets you set the bar for quality. You write a rubric, a separate grader checks the output, and the agent iterates until it gets there. Subscribe to webhooks to get notified when it's done.

items.title_zh: 结果可让您设定质量标准。您编写一个评分标准，一个单独的评分者检查输出，然后代理进行迭代，直到到达那里。订阅 webhooks 以在完成时收到通知。
